options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: post_game_required
options.description: If enabled, Post Game Dungeons may hold key progression items.

options.name: random_character
options.description: If enabled, starting character is randomized.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Idea Chips - The Hell Is All This
Idea Chips - Death is the End
Dungeon Unlock - Virtua Forest Safe Zone
Dungeon Unlock - Rud Arms Sewer N.
Dungeon Unlock - Rud Arms Sewer S.
Dungeon Unlock - Lowee Castle Northern Space
Dungeon Unlock - EM ES Magma Cave
Dungeon Unlock - Pii Shii Game Factory

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
options: Idea Chips - The Hell Is All This
